meta.form_title: Order on Court Fee Waiver (Superior Court)
meta.copyright: © 2024-2026 Michael Vernen Thomas Hartmann. All Rights Reserved.
meta.trademark: VERNEN™ is a trademark of Michael Vernen Thomas Hartmann.

guidance.en: This form is completed BY THE COURT. The court either: grants the fee waiver (all fees waived), partially grants (some fees waived), or denies. If denied, you have 10 days to request a hearing.
guidance.es: Este formulario es completado POR EL TRIBUNAL.

guidance.en: If denied, the court must state reasons. Common denials: incomplete FW-001, income above threshold, insufficient documentation. You can request a hearing within 10 days.
guidance.es: Si se deniega, el tribunal debe indicar las razones.
